title: Plot CDS protein-similarity links across nine majanivirus genomes
summary: Run LOSATP in the browser, assign CDS-derived proteins from nine majanivirus genomes to gbdraw similarity groups, apply product-based feature colors, and draw curved links between group members.

downloads.label: LC738868
downloads.note: Download the Marsupenaeus japonicus endogenous nimavirus record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: LC738874
downloads.note: Download the Melicertus latisulcatus majanivirus record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: LC738870
downloads.note: Download the Penaeus monodon majanivirus A record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: LC738873
downloads.note: Download the Penaeus semisulcatus majanivirus record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: LC738871
downloads.note: Download the Penaeus monodon majanivirus B record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: LC738872
downloads.note: Download the Litopenaeus vannamei majanivirus record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: LC738879
downloads.note: Download the Trachysalambria curvirostris majanivirus record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: LC738876
downloads.note: Download the Metapenaeus ensis majanivirus record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: LC738878
downloads.note: Download the Metapenaeus joyneri majanivirus record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: Default color table
downloads.note: Download this repository-managed color table beside the nine GenBank files.

downloads.label: Specific color table
downloads.note: Contains the product-based feature rules used by the runnable command.

manualSteps.title: Switch to Linear mode
manualSteps.body: Open gbdraw.app and select Linear mode before adding the viral GenBank records.

media.caption: Select Linear before adding the viral GenBank records.

manualSteps.title: Upload the nine GenBank files and labels
manualSteps.body: Keep the records and Organism / strain labels in the same order as the Gallery command so adjacent comparison tracks and labels match the published example.

media.alt: Linear GenBank input row 1 with MjeNMV.gb uploaded and its Organism / strain label in the same input card.
media.caption: The first uploaded row shows MjeNMV.gb and its Organism / strain label in the Linear input card; repeat the remaining rows from the table.

manualSteps.title: Configure browser LOSAT
manualSteps.body: In Pairwise Comparisons, choose Run LOSAT and LOSATP, then set blastp mode to Orthogroups.

rows: 32 requested; capped by the Safe total-thread budget

manualSteps.note: This is a large browser workload. The displayed 32 is a requested per-run maximum, not 32 guaranteed workers: Total threads = Safe caps the effective value to the safe browser budget. Orthogroups mode forms similarity groups for visualization; it does not infer phylogeny-based orthogroups.

media.alt: Run LOSAT settings with LOSATP Orthogroups, Safe total threads, a requested maximum of 32 threads per run, and thresholds 100, 1e-3, 20, and 0.
media.caption: Request up to 32 threads per run; the Safe total-thread budget caps the effective workers. Use thresholds 100 / 1e-3 / 20 / 0.

actions.script: const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) { app.blastSource = 'losat'; app.losatProgram = 'blastp'; app.losat.executionMode = 'auto'; app.losat.totalThreadBudget = 'safe'; app.losat.parallelWorkers = undefined; app.losat.threadsPerJob = '32'; app.losat.blastp.mode = 'orthogroup'; app.adv.min_bitscore = 100; app.adv.evalue = '1e-3'; app.adv.identity = 20; app.adv.alignment_length = 0; }

media.alt: LOSAT Settings panel with the blastp mode menu open and the Orthogroups option highlighted.
media.caption: Open blastp mode in LOSAT Settings and choose the highlighted Orthogroups option.

manualSteps.title: Set the linear layout
manualSteps.body: Use a centered, compact layout so the nine viral genome rows and their match ribbons fit in the same view.

media.alt: Linear Layout card with Middle, Separate Strands, Align to Center, and Lock Definition Column selected.
media.caption: Set Track Layout to Middle and enable Separate Strands, Align to Center, and Lock Definition Column.

media.alt: Title and Legend card with the Legend Position menu open and Right highlighted.
media.caption: Open Legend Position and choose Right.

media.alt: Pairwise Match card with Curve selected and Pairwise Match Height set to 25.
media.caption: Set Pairwise Match Style to Curve and Pairwise Match Height to 25.

actions.script: const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) { app.adv.pairwise_match_style = 'curve'; app.adv.comparison_height = 25; }

manualSteps.title: Add feature color rules
manualSteps.body: Use product-based CDS rules for the broad viral protein categories visible in the Gallery legend.
manualSteps.note: These rules match strings in the product annotations; they do not infer protein-family membership.

media.alt: SPECIFIC RULES (-t) controls with all three majanivirus CDS product rules.
media.caption: Enter the WSSV-like proteins, BIRP, and tyrosine recombinase rows together in SPECIFIC RULES (-t).

actions.script: const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const rows = [{ feat: 'CDS', qual: 'product', val: 'wsv.*-like protein', color: '#89d1fa', cap: 'WSSV-like proteins' }, { feat: 'CDS', qual: 'product', val: 'baculoviral IAP repeat-containing protein', color: '#ffff00', cap: 'BIRP' }, { feat: 'CDS', qual: 'product', val: 'tyrosine recombinase', color: '#ff0000', cap: 'tyrosine recombinase' }]; if (app?.manualSpecificRules?.splice) app.manualSpecificRules.splice(0, app.manualSpecificRules.length, ...rows);

const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) app.sidebarWidth = 480; const heading = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('h4')).find((node) => node.textContent?.includes('SPECIFIC RULES')); const header = heading?.parentElement; const rows = header?.nextElementSibling; if (!header || !rows) throw new Error('Majanivirus specific-rules rows not found.'); header.setAttribute('data-capture', 'majanivirus-specific-rules-header'); rows.setAttribute('data-capture', 'majanivirus-specific-rules-rows'); rows.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' });

media.alt: DEFAULT COLORS grid with the CDS swatch set to #d3d3d3.
media.caption: Set the default CDS color to #d3d3d3.

manualSteps.title: Generate the diagram
manualSteps.body: Click Generate Diagram. The finished preview should show nine viral genome rows, many red identity-scaled similarity-group ribbons, and a right legend.

media.alt: Generated majanivirus protein-similarity preview showing nine viral genome rows and the right legend.
media.caption: The generated preview includes nine rows and the right legend.

actions.script: document.querySelector('.preview-feature-search')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); document.querySelector('.preview-controls')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) { app.resultPanelTab = 'preview'; app.zoom = 0.5; if (app.svgContainer) app.svgContainer.style.transform = 'translate(0px, 0px) scale(0.5)'; const svg = app.svgContainer?.querySelector('svg'); svg?.setAttribute('data-capture', 'majanivirus-final-preview'); }

manualSteps.title: Inspect a similarity-group ribbon
manualSteps.body: Click a pairwise match ribbon to inspect the gbdraw group ID, annotation-derived display name, member count, and record coverage. The table below the summary lists all member proteins.

media.alt: Selected og_31 pairwise ribbon beside the similarity-group popup for wsv360-like protein.
media.caption: Click the highlighted og_31 ribbon; the compact popup summary shows wsv360-like protein with 9 members across all 9 records.

actions.script: document.querySelector('.preview-feature-search')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) { app.resultPanelTab = 'preview'; app.zoom = 1.15; if (app.svgContainer) app.svgContainer.style.transform = 'translate(-110px, -30px) scale(1.15)'; }

const popup = document.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup'); const target = document.querySelector("path[data-gbdraw-pairwise-match-id='comparison1_match1']"); const text = popup?.textContent || ''; const rect = target?.getBoundingClientRect(); if (!text.includes('og_31') || !text.includes('wsv360-like protein') || !rect) throw new Error('Expected og_31 popup content was not restored.'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app?.clickedPairwiseMatchPos) { const rightX = rect.right + 24; app.clickedPairwiseMatchPos.x = rightX + 720 <= window.innerWidth - 12 ? rightX : Math.max(12, rect.left - 744); app.clickedPairwiseMatchPos.y = Math.max(24, Math.min(window.innerHeight - 500, rect.top - 80)); }

() => { const target = document.querySelector("path[data-gbdraw-pairwise-match-id='comparison1_match1']")?.getBoundingClientRect(); const popup = document.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup')?.getBoundingClientRect(); return Boolean(target && popup && (popup.right <= target.left || popup.left >= target.right || popup.bottom <= target.top || popup.top >= target.bottom)); }

const popup = document.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup'); const section = popup?.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup-section'); const title = section?.querySelector('.pairwise-match-popup-section-title'); const rows = Array.from(section?.querySelectorAll('.pairwise-match-popup-row') || []).slice(0, 4); if (!popup || !title || rows.length !== 4) throw new Error('Compact og_31 summary not found.'); popup.children[0]?.setAttribute('data-capture', 'og31-popup-header'); title.setAttribute('data-capture', 'og31-popup-summary-title'); rows.forEach((row, index) => row.setAttribute('data-capture', `og31-popup-summary-row-${index + 1}`));

colorRules.title: Use product to match the annotation categories
colorRules.body: The visible categories in this figure are WSSV-like proteins, BIRP, tyrosine recombinase, and other proteins. The corresponding terms occur in the product annotations, so the color rules match that qualifier.

colorRules.title: Keep regex values narrow enough
colorRules.body: Rules are matching patterns. wsv.*-like protein is specific enough for this dataset, while a value such as protein would match most CDS features.

colorRules.title: Use default CDS color for the background
colorRules.body: Set default CDS to #d3d3d3 so the highlighted product families stand out without adding a rule for every annotation.

colorRules.title: Separate feature colors from ribbon colors
colorRules.body: Feature color rules affect genome features. Similarity-group ribbon color is controlled by pairwise match identity and the comparison style.

losatTips.title: Use the session for quick inspection
losatTips.body: This is a large example. Load the Gallery session first when the goal is to inspect the finished figure rather than benchmark a fresh LOSATP run.

losatTips.title: Start with Auto execution
losatTips.body: Auto uses threaded LOSAT only when the browser supports it and the workload justifies it.

losatTips.title: Prefer Safe total threads
losatTips.body: Safe leaves some logical CPUs unused so the browser can remain responsive.

losatTips.title: Treat 32 as a requested maximum
losatTips.body: The Gallery state records 32 threads per run, but Total threads = Safe caps the effective workers. Increase the total budget only on a capable local environment.

losatTips.title: Reuse the cache
losatTips.body: The app reuses LOSAT results when the input files and LOSAT settings have not changed, so styling edits avoid another search.

troubleshooting.title: The browser becomes slow
troubleshooting.body: Load the Gallery session for inspection, close other heavy tabs, run LOSAT with Safe or Serial settings, or temporarily reduce the number of records while tuning layout.

troubleshooting.title: Expected ribbons are missing
troubleshooting.body: Check that protein blastp mode is Orthogroups, the input order matches the Gallery session, and the bit score, E-value, and identity thresholds match the tutorial values.

troubleshooting.title: The rows do not match the Gallery figure
troubleshooting.body: Check Align to Center, Separate Strands, Show Length / Coordinates set to Off, record labels, and the nine-record input order.

troubleshooting.title: Feature categories are not colored
troubleshooting.body: Check that the product rules and default CDS color are present, and inspect a CDS popup to verify that the expected product text exists in the input annotations.

troubleshooting.title: Threaded LOSAT is unavailable
troubleshooting.body: Use Auto or Serial execution. Some browser contexts disable SharedArrayBuffer or cross-origin isolation, which prevents threaded WebAssembly.

related.label: Compare with the Hepatoplasmataceae protein-similarity example
